title: Super Rick Understanding document
description: Metadata contract for understandings/ docs in a Super Rick product hub (voice, video, chat, vision). Prototype: standard-voice-stack/understandings/Super-Rick-Why-Guide.md.

slug.description: kebab-case product slug, e.g. super-rick-voice, super-rick-chat

title.description: Human product name, e.g. Super Rick Voice Agent

domain.description: Modality lane — drives filename prefix and Pockit cassette id hints

repoHub.description: Canonical git repo id for understandings/, e.g. standard-voice-stack

compVersion.description: COMP north-star doc version (not Pockit semver)

pockitCassetteId.description: Pockit route cassette id, e.g. voice, video, chat

designStandardsRepo.description: Super Rick intent chrome + orb aesthetic registry

companionDocs.description: Relative paths to sibling understanding docs in the same hub

stalenessPointers.description: Docs that supersede stale claims in this file when facts drift
